symbols.name: op_last_n_user_turns(&
symbols.signature: b(crate) fn drop_last_n_user_turns(&mut self, num_turns: u32) {
symbols.doc: Drop the last `num_turns` user turns from this history. "User turns" are identified as `ResponseItem::Message` entries whose role is `"user"`. This mirrors thread-rollback semantics: - `num_turns == 0` is a no-op - if there are no user turns, this is a no-op - if `num_turns` exceeds the number of user turns, all user turns are dropped while preserving any items that occurred before the first user message.
symbols.role_hint: 更像流程中的一个动作节点，负责完成某一步操作。

symbols.name: ems_after_last_model_generated_item(&
symbols.doc: These are local items added after the most recent model-emitted item. They are not reflected in `last_token_usage.total_tokens`.
symbols.body_text:
let start = self
            .items
            .iter()
            .rposition(is_model_generated_item)
            .map_or(self.items.len(), |index| index.saturating_add(1));
        &self.items[start..]
    }

symbols.role_hint: 更像流程中的一个动作节点，负责完成某一步操作。

symbols.name: t_total_token_usage_breakdown(&
symbols.body_text:
let last_usage = self
            .token_info
            .as_ref()
            .map(|info| info.last_token_usage.clone())
            .unwrap_or_default();
        let items_after_last_model_generated = self.items_after_last_model_generated_item();

        TotalTokenUsageBreakdown {
            last_api_response_total_tokens: last_usage.total_tokens,
            all_history_items_model_visible_bytes: self
                .items
                .iter()
                .map(estimate_response_item_model_visible_bytes)
                .fold(0i64, i64::saturating_add),
            estimated_tokens_of_items_added_since_last_successful_api_response:
                items_after_last_model_generated
                    .iter()
                    .map(estimate_item_token_count)
                    .fold(0i64, i64::saturating_add),
            estimated_bytes_of_items_added_since_last_successful_api_response:
                items_after_last_model_generated
                    .iter()
                    .map(estimate_response_item_model_visible_bytes)
                    .fold(0i64, i64::saturating_add),
        }
    }
symbols.role_hint: 更像流程中的一个动作节点，负责完成某一步操作。
symbols.difficulty_hint: 整体不算绕，但第一次读时最好先抓输入、输出和状态变化。

symbols.name: AGE_BYTES_ESTIMATE:
symbols.doc: Approximate model-visible byte cost for one image input. The estimator later converts bytes to tokens using a 4-bytes/token heuristic with ceiling division, so 7,373 bytes maps to approximately 1,844 tokens.
